framework.name: OAuth Transaction Tokens for Agents (draft-oauth-transaction-tokens-for-agents-00)
framework.description: Amazon-authored IETF Internet-Draft extending OAuth Transaction Tokens with 'actor' (agent identity) and 'principal' (initiating human/system) context fields. Defines two flows: principal-initiated (auth code grant) and autonomous (client credentials grant). Not endorsed by IETF, no working group adoption, no RFC stream assigned.
framework.raw_quote: This I-D is not endorsed by the IETF and has no formal standing in the IETF standards process.
